_description: webp icon CDN: normalized squircle icons 1024×1024, .webp only, under webp/

single point of entry: this file
file_tree.repo.config.json: this file; full tree + cross-refs here only
file_tree.image-formats.txt: extensions allowed for normalization; consumed by .hooks/pre-commit
file_tree.bin: scripts + mask; see bin/* one-liners below
file_tree.bin/squircle.sh: one image → squircle WebP; pipeline in script header
file_tree.bin/squircle-batch.sh: batch: run squircle on every file in dir (GNU Parallel, -j 0 = one per CPU)
file_tree.bin/get-bg-color.sh: edge/corner sampling → #HEX or OPAQUE; used by squircle.sh
file_tree.bin/sharpen.sh: sharpen image; optional pre-step for sources
file_tree.bin/colorpick.sh: CLI color dropper: pixel or palette → hex
file_tree.bin/git-webp-tighten.sh: history rewrite: webp/ = latest or sliding window; reads bin/git-webp-tighten.config
file_tree.bin/mask.png: squircle mask; squircle.sh uses or fallback round-rect
file_tree..hooks/pre-commit: only staged under webp/; 1024×1024 .webp only; strip metadata; refs image-formats.txt
file_tree..hooks/scripts/setup.sh: one-time: git config include + chmod hooks
file_tree.git-template: stub hooks for git init; clone uses this

_manifest.docs: optional: docs/*.config.json for large tangents only; else self-document in scripts (inline) or workflow
